message:
test(collect): add FD parsing edge case regression test

Adds a targeted regression test for the file descriptor directory parser
to ensure non-numeric entries in /proc/pid/fd are correctly ignored.

Problem addressed:
When parsing /proc/pid/fd directories, entries like "foo" (from
procfs quirks or race conditions) could previously cause issues:
- Non-numeric filenames being interpreted as fd=0
- Spurious entries inflating the FD count

Test coverage:
- Creates a temp directory simulating /proc/pid/fd structure
- Adds a valid numeric entry "1" and an invalid entry "foo"
- Verifies that only numeric entries are counted
- Ensures non-numeric entries don't map to fd=0

This test validates the robustness of parse_fd_dir() against
edge cases in real /proc filesystem parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
